title: Amtech 900mm x 12mm Security Cable Lock with Built-in LED Combination, T1835, Black
features: LED COMBINATION LOCK: This security bike lock cable has a combination lock with built-in LED lights for use in dark conditions
SECURE AND NON-SCRATCHING: The braided, hardened steel cable is 900mm long with a 12mm diameter and has a protective vinyl sleeve to prevent scratching
BATTERIES INCLUDED: The kit is supplied with 2 Lithium CR927 3V batteries
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains LED Combination Cable Lock See more
